ham.subject: Your AcmeCRM Subscription Renewal Reminder – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello John,

This is a reminder that your AcmeCRM subscription is set to renew on 15 April 2026. The renewal amount will be $199.99, billed to the payment method on file. If you would like to change the billing information, adjust the plan, or pause the renewal, please visit <URL> before the renewal date.

Thank you for choosing AcmeCRM. If you have questions, contact support@acmecrm.com.

Best regards,
AcmeCRM Billing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your IT Ticket #56789
spam.body:
Hi Jane,

We have received an IT helpdesk ticket regarding a potential security issue with your account. In order to protect your data, we need you to verify your identity and confirm the recent login activity. Please click the link below to complete the verification process:

<URL>

If you do not take action within 24 hours, your account may be suspended.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
IT Support Team
